curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff which modified four functions in src/PHPMailer.php: addAttachment, addEmbeddedImage, encodeFile, and setLanguage. Each function previously used direct calls to file_exists/is_file/is_readable on user-supplied paths without consolidated protection against phar deserialization. The patch introduces a fileIsAccessible() method that centralizes path safety checks. No sibling files in src/ (SMTP.php, POP3.php, OAuth.php, Exception.php) handle file attachment paths, so no sibling locations apply. Vulnerability class insecure-deserialization confirmed from CWE-502 and advisory description describing PHP phar object injection.
